title: $3 billion toll: US counts losses in aircraft, drones, defence systems
content: Iran's war has severely impacted US military assets, with initial losses and repairs estimated between $1.4 billion and $2.9 billion. Ballistic missiles and drone strikes have targeted advanced fighter jets, refueling tankers, and crucial surveillance systems, including expensive radars.  The conflict's financial toll is escalating, even without a full ground war.

title: Middle East crisis: Mediators gather in Pakistan for talks on ending month-long Iran war
content: Top diplomats from Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Egypt met in Pakistan over the weekend. They discussed ending the Middle East conflict. Fighting continued with US-Israeli strikes on Iran and Iranian missile and drone attacks. Iran rejected a US peace proposal. The conflict has caused over 3,000 deaths across the region. Diplomatic efforts continue despite ongoing hostilities.

title: How OpenAI may have caused worst consumer hardware crisis with unreal purchase orders
content: A social media post claims Sam Altman's OpenAI may have triggered a decade-long consumer hardware crisis. Allegations suggest non-binding deals for memory chips inflated prices significantly. These agreements, reportedly for 40% of global supply, were not actual purchase orders. The market reacted as if they were real, causing prices to double.

title: No Suryakumar Yadav in MI XI as Hardik Pandya opts to bowl vs KKR
content: Mumbai Indians captain Hardik Pandya won the toss and chose to bowl against Kolkata Knight Riders at Wankhede Stadium, citing a greener pitch. Suryakumar Yadav is absent from the starting XI, expected as an Impact Player. MI aims to break their opening match losing streak since 2012, with debut caps for Ghazanfar and Rutherford.

title: Gold, silver outlook: Markets brace for volatile week as Gulf tensions, Fed cues weigh
content: Precious metals are poised for a corrective phase this week, with Middle East developments and crucial US economic data, including Fed speeches, shaping investor sentiment. Domestic gold saw a slight dip, while silver gained, supported by a weaker rupee. Global gold declined, but silver rebounded, buoyed by safe-haven demand and strong Chinese imports.

title: OpenAI founder proposes to remove income tax on Americans earning less than $100k
content: Venture capitalist Vinod Khosla proposes eliminating federal income tax for Americans earning under $100,000, funded by higher capital gains taxes. He believes this addresses AI-driven job loss fears, a major concern for voters. Khosla also critiques current political approaches to AI, seeking a "surprise" presidential candidate focused on displaced worker security.

title: 'Big thanks': 6,000 PNG users surrendered their LPG connections, says govt
content: Thousands are switching from LPG to piped natural gas (PNG) as the government urges more to adopt the cleaner fuel. This move aims to free up LPG for areas without pipeline access, especially amid global supply pressures. Expansion of PNG networks is accelerating, with incentives offered to encourage the shift.

title: CSK in trouble! After MS Dhoni injury, star player ruled out of IPL 2026 start
content: Chennai Super Kings face significant injury blows ahead of IPL 2026, with Dewald Brevis sidelined for the initial matches due to a side strain. This adds to the absence of MS Dhoni and Nathan Ellis, impacting the team's middle order and bowling attack. CSK will aim to overcome these setbacks as they begin their campaign against Rajasthan Royals.

title: Before Google, Meta wanted to buy DeepMind: CEO shares what went wrong
content: Mark Zuckerberg's bid for AI lab DeepMind in 2014 failed not due to finances, but a dinner with co-founder Demis Hassabis. Hassabis sought a partner prioritizing Artificial General Intelligence, not just another tech trend. Zuckerberg's broad enthusiasm for multiple emerging technologies, including VR and 3D printing, revealed his lack of singular focus on AGI, leading Hassabis to choose Google's offer.

title: 'Remember these two criminals': Iran names US officers responsible for Minab school strike
content: Iran has identified two US Navy officers from the USS Spruance as responsible for a missile strike on a Minab school that killed 168 people. The strike, part of Operation Epic Fury, targeted a nearby IRGC naval base. While US media suggests the school was damaged in coordinated operations, a preliminary US investigation indicates a potential targeting error.

title: Middle East war, oil prices to steer markets in holiday-shortened week
content: Indian stock markets brace for a volatile, shortened week. Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, crude oil price fluctuations, and the rupee's stability are key concerns. Foreign investors have pulled significant funds amid the ongoing conflict. Analysts anticipate continued sensitivity to global developments, with domestic economic data also under scrutiny.

title: 'Ek ko papa chun le': Harbhajan's reply to ‘three clowns’ jibe goes viral
content: Harbhajan Singh went viral after hitting back at a troll who called him, Virender Sehwag, and Aakash Chopra “three clowns” during an IPL broadcast. He replied, “Inme se ek ko papa chun le,” earning praise for his witty comeback. The exchange sparked debate on trolling, highlighting how quickly social media reactions can escalate during major cricket events.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' BO day 11: Ranveer-starrer eyes Rs 800 crore collection
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' is making history with every passing day at the Indian box office. Directed by Aditya Dhar and starring Ranveer Singh, the espionage thriller has crossed Rs. 790 crore in India net after eleven days, becoming only the third Hindi film ever to breach the Rs. 800 crore domestic net mark. The film is now chasing the lifetime record of its predecessor, 'Dhurandhar,' which stands at Rs. 894.49 crore — a milestone that could fall within the current week. Globally, the film is tracking past Rs. 1,079 crore and closing in on Rs. 1,200 crore worldwide, which would place it among the top three highest-grossing Indian films of all time.

title: ‘Sustained harassment’: What 'drove' Bengaluru family to deadly suicide bid
content: A Bengaluru family's crippling debt and a daughter's critical illness led to a tragic suicide attempt. Two women died, while a man and a child are critically injured. A video message revealed the family's despair over lender pressure and financial ruin, possibly linked to a chit fund business and medical expenses. Investigations are underway.

title: Toppers' list out for Bihar Board Class 10: Check full merit list
content: The Bihar School Examination Board has released the Class 10 merit list along with the Matric Result 2026. Pushpanjali Kumari and Sabreen Praween jointly secured the top rank with 492 marks (98.4 percent). The top 10 list reflects strong performances from students across several districts. Female students dominated the top positions, continuing recent trends. The results highlight intense competition, with minimal differences in marks among top rankers.

title: Antonio Brown sparks outrage with racist jab at Tiger Woods after DUI news
content: Tiger Woods was arrested after a Florida car crash despite a 0.00 breathalyzer result, raising questions about impairment and legal consequences. The situation escalated when Antonio Brown posted, “Tiger Woods drives a car exactly how you would think a black Asian drives”, sparking backlash and shifting focus from concern to controversy online.

title: 'Virat bhai’s only instruction was…': Padikkal reveals Kohli’s mantra in RCB’s chase
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru began their Indian Premier League 2026 season with a strong victory against Sunrisers Hyderabad. Devdutt Padikkal and Virat Kohli's partnership was key in chasing a 202-run target. Padikkal highlighted Kohli's guidance and the support from coaches. This win marks a significant start for the defending champions.

title: Inside SRK's Rs 200 cr 'Mannat': A six-storey bungalow with Gauri Khan's designs
content: Shah Rukh Khan's iconic Mumbai residence, 'Mannat', stands as a testament to his remarkable journey from a middle-class boy to a Bollywood superstar. Once a heritage bungalow, it was acquired and transformed into a symbol of his fulfilled aspirations.

title: PM Modi slams Cong for making 'dangerous' remarks amid Middle East crisis
content: Prime Minister Modi assured minimal impact from the Middle East war on India, prioritizing the safety of citizens abroad. He criticized the Congress for making "dangerous" statements on the sensitive issue for political gain. Modi also attacked Kerala's ruling fronts, LDF and UDF, for corruption and poor governance, positioning BJP-NDA as a viable alternative.

title: 'A long wait of nearly seven decades': PM Modi hails J&K's Ranji win
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi hailed Jammu and Kashmir’s first Ranji Trophy win as a proud moment after nearly 70 years. In ‘Mann Ki Baat’, he praised the team’s hard work, captain Paras Dogra’s leadership, and Aaqib Nabi’s 60 wickets. Modi said the victory has inspired the region and boosted sports enthusiasm, adding that Jammu and Kashmir is emerging as a sporting hub and expressing hope for continued success.

title: Up, up and away: Is the world running out of Helium gas?
content: Global helium supplies face a critical shortage due to Middle East tensions disrupting production and shipping. This invisible gas, vital for MRIs, semiconductors, and advanced tech, is irreplaceable and lost forever once released. India, heavily reliant on imports, sees soaring prices and potential disruptions in healthcare and its burgeoning chip industry.

title: ‘Bizarre at this age’: Ashwin in awe of Virat Kohli’s relentless intensity
content: Ravichandran Ashwin lauded Virat Kohli's "bizarre" energy levels at his age, stating the Indian stalwart continues to "walk the talk" after stepping away from Tests and T20Is. Kohli's unbeaten 69 in the IPL 2026 opener against SRH showcased his enduring hunger and intensity between the wickets, setting a benchmark for the game.

title: India at 116: Why India’s growth isn’t translating into happiness
content: Despite India's rapid economic growth, the World Happiness Report ranks it low, highlighting that material progress alone doesn't ensure well-being. Factors like urbanization pressures, job insecurity, and evolving social structures contribute to lower life satisfaction, underscoring the need for a broader definition of progress beyond GDP.

title: Asia’s largest marble waste dumping yard in Rajasthan draws visitors
content: Asia's largest marble waste dumping site in Kishangarh, Rajasthan, has transformed into a popular tourist spot, attracting thousands daily for its striking white landscape and photo opportunities. Despite its scenic appeal, environmentalists warn of severe health and ecological hazards due to unregulated dumping and contamination.

title: Virat Kohli 'changed a lot after retiring from Test cricket'
content: Virat Kohli’s unbeaten 69 powered RCB to a successful chase, showing his top form after a T20 break. Dale Steyn praised his improved six-hitting and evolving mindset. Kohli’s aggressive approach has grown over time. Devdutt Padikkal said Kohli’s presence eased pressure, while also crediting coaches Andy Flower and Dinesh Karthik for his development.

title: 'BJP says can't eat fish, meat': Mamta Banerjee campaigns in Purulia
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee fiercely criticized the BJP in Purulia, accusing them of intending to curb local food habits like fish and meat consumption. She also alleged the Election Commission's voter list deletions targeted her supporters and highlighted the success of her Lakshmir Bhandar scheme, warning of its discontinuation under BJP rule.

title: Bigg Boss 18 fame Rajat Dalal gets married; shares a glimpse of his wedding ceremony
content: Bigg Boss 18 contestant Rajat Dalal has announced his marriage, marking a new chapter in his life. He expressed gratitude to his fans for their unwavering love and support, acknowledging their role in his journey. Dalal's fans have responded with congratulations and well wishes for his married life.

title: Bihar Board 10th result 2026: What to do if you fail in BSEB matric exam
content: The Bihar Board has declared the Class 10 Result 2026 with an 81.79 percent pass rate, but students who failed still have options. Candidates can apply for compartment exams, special exams, or scrutiny between April 1 and April 7. The Board aims to release compartment results by May 31, allowing students to continue their studies without losing a year. These measures ensure multiple opportunities for students to improve their performance.

title: MI vs KKR: 5 players to watch out for
content: Mumbai Indians face Kolkata Knight Riders in their IPL 2026 opener at Wankhede. MI aim to end their title drought, while KKR seek a comeback. Key players include Rohit Sharma, Suryakumar Yadav, and Mitchell Santner for MI, alongside Sunil Narine and Blessing Muzarabani for KKR, who could play decisive roles in this high-stakes clash.

title: Foreign investors stay on selling spree, pull out record Rs 1.14 lakh cr in March
content: Foreign investors withdrew a record Rs 1.14 lakh crore from Indian equities in March, driven by Middle East tensions, rupee pressure, and concerns over high crude oil prices impacting growth. This significant outflow follows a period of strong inflows in February and reflects a broader risk aversion trend in emerging markets.

title: Hormuz chokehold: What's happening to petrol prices in India & neighbouring nations?
content: Global crude markets are strained as Middle East conflict escalates, pushing oil prices up and impacting fuel supplies worldwide. Countries like India, Nepal, Bhutan, Pakistan, Sri Lanka, Myanmar, and Bangladesh are implementing measures such as price adjustments, import increases, and conservation efforts to manage the crisis.

title: Gurgaon horror: Speeding Thar ploughs into man, 2 grandsons, all dead; chilling CCTV emerges
content: A tragic accident in Pataudi claimed the lives of a 60-year-old man and his two grandsons, aged 8 and 10, when a Mahindra Thar struck them at high speed. The victims were on the roadside when the SUV rammed them, causing fatal injuries. The driver, an IT firm employee, was arrested following the incident.

title: 12-year-old girl steals candy box from shop, father beats her to death in UP
content: A father allegedly beat his 12-year-old daughter to death in Bulandshahr. The girl reportedly stole candies from a local shop. Her mother was injured while trying to intervene. The father is accused of murder and efforts are underway to apprehend him. The incident occurred after a Navratri feast.

title: Mumbai Indians hit 300-match mark, first franchise to reach T20 milestone
content: Mumbai Indians are set to become the first franchise team to play 300 T20 matches when they face Kolkata Knight Riders in their IPL 2026 opener. This historic milestone underscores their enduring presence and success in the shortest format of the game. The team aims to mark this occasion by ending their five-year title drought.

title: How Arizona beat Purdue and Illinois defeated Iowa in Saturday's Elite Eight
content: The Wildcats and Fighting Illini are Final Four bound. Here's how they punched their tickets to Indianapolis.

title: Adesanya walloped by Pyfer in 2nd-round finish
content: Joe Pyfer scored the biggest win of his career by finishing two-time champion Israel Adesanya by ground-and-pound in Round 2 in the UFC Fight Night main event.

title: Braves' Smith hits walk-off days after mom's death
content: Making his Braves debut, Dominic Smith said he "got choked up" thinking about his late mother as he celebrated his walk-off grand slam in Saturday's 6-2 win over the Royals.

title: Verstappen considering quitting F1 at end of 2026
content: Max Verstappen has said he is considering retiring from Formula 1 at the end of 2026, admitting he is "not enjoying the sport."

title: Semenya rips IOC chief over transgender ban
content: Two-time Olympic champion runner Caster Semenya expressed her disappointment with IOC president Kirsty Coventry over the decision to ban transgender athletes from competing at the Games.

title: USMNT routed by Belgium in blow to WCup prep
content: The USMNT suffered a setback in its preparations for the World Cup as Belgium ran rampant in the second half to emerge with a 5-2 win at Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium on Saturday.

title: Easily out, L.A.'s Freeman tagged by Marte's hug
content: With nowhere to run on the basepaths, the Dodgers' Freddie Freeman walked toward a smiling Ketel Marte, who tagged him out with a hug to end the second inning of Saturday night's game.

title: Mayweather pumps brakes on Pacquiao rematch
content: Floyd Mayweather cast some doubt on the details of his pending fight with Manny Pacquiao, saying the location has not be set and that the bout will actually just be an exhibition.

title: 📸 LeBron to Bronny assist makes history
content: The father-son duo etched their names in the history books after the elder James found his son for a 3-pointer.

title: Everything you need to know for Sunday's women's Elite Eight matchups
content: We've got you covered for all of Saturday's action, from pregame analysis to postgame keys for UConn, Duke, Notre Dame and UCLA.

title: Women's March Madness 2026: Ranking the Elite Eight
content: All four No. 1 seeds advanced to the regional final. The ACC, Big Ten and SEC each have two teams in the field.

title: Peyton Manning: Pat Summitt changed my life
content: Legendary NFL quarterback Peyton Manning recounts a career-changing meeting with Pat Summitt that he credits for sparking a lifelong friendship.

title: Predicting top wide receiver prospects' NFL stats: Who ranks No. 1 in the 2026 draft class?
content: Which receivers in the 2026 draft class will have the most success in the pros? We have projections for the top prospects.

title: Latest NFL draft buzz: Ty Simpson's pro day and more
content: How high could QB Ty Simpson get picked? Is Jeremiyah Love really a possibility for the Titans at No. 4?

title: NBA playoff watch: With postseason teams set, seeding battles begin
content: Things are getting tight in the East. Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Saturday.

title: Man United need to decide soon whether to back Carrick or hire someone else
content: Man United are approaching the point at which they need to decide: Is Michael Carrick our next permanent manager or not? Ian Darke unpacks their dilemma.

title: Time is running out for Foden to make England's World Cup squad
content: In less than 18 months, the Man City playmaker has gone from England mainstay to the fringe of the squad.

title: USMNT handed reality check by Doku, Belgium ahead of World Cup
content: Belgium provided a sobering assessment of where the USMNT currently stands, doling out a heavy 5-2 defeat that will leave Mauricio Pochettino with plenty to ponder.

title: Player ratings: Weah poor as USMNT suffer heavy Belgium defeat
content: It was a difficult game for the U.S. against Belgium, with Tim Weah struggling to make a positive impact.

title: As it happened: Kimi Antonelli takes second career win in Suzuka
content: The third grand prix of the 2026 Formula 1 season is upon us at the Suzuka Circuit in Japan, and you can follow it all with ESPN.

title: WNBA's CBA: 10 biggest wins from new agreement
content: The CBA permanently and positively changes the WNBA's landscape. These are the wins, biggest strides and areas of compromise.

title: Lehigh Valley IronPigs poke fun at Zack Wheeler's rib removal in rehab promo
content: The Phillies' ace had a rib removed as part of a surgery to remove a blood clot -- and kept it in his closet.

title: Moses Itauma isn't the next heavyweight star, his era is already here
content: Moses Itauma's emphatic rise up the heavyweight pecking order continued on Saturday as the boxing world watched in awe at the 21-year-old's knockout over Jermaine Franklin Jr.

title: Tyrell Fortune: Living to fight another day after they pronounced me dead
content: Bellator heavyweight Tyrell Fortune recalls the weight cut that nearly took his life and left him with a new outlook.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Palmer ready to leave Chelsea for Man United?
content: Cole Palmer is becoming increasingly disillusioned at Chelsea and is ready to consider a move to Manchester United. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the fantasy baseball season.

content: From a high of 91 candidates in 2016, the number of women candidates for Mandate 2026 is only four more than the 55 in 2001.

content: In Shivamogga city, roads were flooded, causing hardship for motorists; power supply was also disrupted in many localities owing to the heavy showers

title: IAS officers shuffled in Andhra Pradesh; Shan Mohan is new CEO of APEDB
content: Four districts get new Collectors; Thameem Ansariya is Director of School Education, while Dinesh Kumar is Managing Director of APIIC

title: Amit Shah says curbing ‘infiltration not enough’, every ‘illegal immigrant’ must be deported from Assam
content: Claiming that "Assam State Congress president Gaurav Gogoi wants to protect infiltrators", Amit Shah asked him to clarify his stand on the issue

content: MLA Inigo Irudhayaraj says the TVK founder has not spoken against the BJP government’s mistreatment of minorities

content: Jaswinder, who is survived by his wife, a 22-year-old son, and his elderly mother, had been working as a driver in Dubai for the past fifteen years

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Still waiting for your Voter ID? Download it online
content: If your name is on the electoral roll and your mobile number is registered with the Election Commission of India and linked to your EPIC, you can download your e-EPIC online.

title: TVK chief Vijay to contest from Perambur, Tiruchi East constituencies making electoral debut in T.N. Assembly election
content: TVK general secretary ‘Bussy’ N. Anand will contest from T. Nagar in Chennai, while K.A. Sengottaiyan will test the waters from his home turf, Gobichettipalayam. Aadhav Arjuna will contest from Villivakkam, K.G. Arunraaj from Tiruchengode and C.T.R. Nirmal Kumar from Thirupparankundram.

title: Hotels in rural areas of Shivamogga badly hit owing to disruption in supply of commercial LPG
content: Many small hotel owners, who usually earn few thousand rupees a day, have been forced to shut down their businesses, due to non-availability of LPG

title: Mysuru airport announces revised flight schedules
content: The updated schedule, effective from Sunday (March 29) as part of the Summer Schedule, aims to streamline operations and enhance passenger connectivity

title: How close contests impacted victory margins in past Assembly elections in Tamil Nadu
content: An analysis of the results of Assembly elections in the State since 1967, shows there have been occasions where candidates lost by fewer than 25 votes

title: Sri Lankan journalist and The Hindu franchisee K.V.S. Mohan passes away
content: Mr. Mohan was the founder-editor of Kadambam, one of Sri Lanka’s earliest Tamil magazines, launched in 1959, and ran it for over three decades

title: Government ramps up measures to ensure fuel, LPG supplies amid Hormuz disruption
content: To boost domestic availability, the government has cut excise duty on petrol and diesel by ₹10 per litre and imposed export levies of ₹21.50 per litre on diesel and ₹29.50 per litre on aviation turbine fuel (ATF)

title: Closure of eateries: Migrant labourers return to their native States
content: Lakhs of workers were engaged in hotels, restaurants, roadside eateries, catering and fast food centres in State

title: Tamil Nadu CM Stalin to begin his election campaign in Tiruvarur on March 31
content: Mr. Stalin will address a meeting on South Street near the Tiruvarur Thyagarajaswamy Temple and cover the Mannargudi, Tiruvarur, Kizhvelur, Nannilam and Thiruthuraipoondi constituencies on the same day.

title: Indian Railways shows red flag to unauthorised expenses
content: The Railway Board racks the whip after audit reports pointed to huge unsanctioned expenditure in the last 5 years

title: 40 pilgrims injured as bus rams into tree in Uttar Pradesh's Mau
content: The accident occurred around 1.30 a.m. on the Ratanpura-Mubarakpur road under the Haldharpur police station area when the driver lost control of the bus and rammed it into a roadside tree, police said.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Ballot printing only in 3 govt presses this time as ECI introduces colour images
content: Of the 11 presses under the department in the State, the ballots for the upcoming polls can be printed only at two facilities in Thiruvananthapuram and one in Ernakulam

title: Sathya Sai district police issue stern warning against cricket betting
content: The Superintendent of Police cautioned that those turning cricket into a form of gambling and exploiting innocent people will face firm action

title: Viral Bengaluru Central Prison video may be staged; probe points to smear campaign
content: Three inmates have been placed in quarantine cells for disciplinary reasons; Officials stated that the inmates confessed that the video was intended to frame prison authorities in retaliation for stricter rules

title: Incarceration without trial is punishment, says Supreme Court; grants bail to accused in jail for two years
content: A bench of Justices Dipankar Datta and P.V. Varale, in its recent order, said Pradeep Kumar alias Banu was booked for various offences, including attempt to murder, in February 2024, but the prosecution is yet to examine any one of the 23 witnesses related to the case

title: Breaks ensured I stay fresh and excited: Kohli
content: Virat Kohli's 38-ball 69, studded with five sixes and as many fours, powered Royal Challengers Bengaluru to a comfortable six-wicket win over Sunrisers Hyderabad in the IPL season opener on March 28

title: Nashik court extends 'godman' Ashok Kharat's police custody till April 1
content: Ten FIRs, eight for alleged sexual assault or exploitation and two for cheating, have so far been registered against him at Sarkarwada police station in the city.

title: Pakistan Hosts Saudi Arabia, Turkey, Egypt For Talks On Iran War
content: Pakistan said Saudi Arabia, Turkey and Egypt will send top diplomats to Islamabad for talks. Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said he and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian held "extensive discussions" on regional hostilities.

title: 2 Australian States Offer Free Public Transport As Fuel Prices Rise Amid Iran War
content: Australia faces elevated fuel supply risks, with several hundred service stations reporting shortfalls, and disruptions in delivery reported in the agriculture and mining sectors.

content: A constructive way forward could involve deeper engagement with the IFDA, identifying areas where safeguards may be necessary.

content: AIADMK says that Senthil Balaji's shift is not a strategic move, but a sign of his political vulnerability

content: The incident took place on Friday during Ram Navami celebrations, when several parts of the state witnessed unruly scenes, including reports of hooliganism and reckless behaviour.

title: Bengaluru Jail Inmates Seen Using Mobile Phones, TV, 3 Staffers Suspended
content: Preliminary findings suggest that mobile phones were concealed in an underground pipeline area near the toilet block, allowing inmates to evade routine checks.

title: "No Place For Self-Serving Politics": PM Modi's Jab At Opposition Amid Gulf War
content: PM Modi said India's global relations and the strengths built over the past decade have enabled India to face challenges posed by the Middle East war.

content: The group's entry into the conflict "marks a serious and deeply concerning escalation", said Farea Al-Muslimi, a research fellow at Chatham House.

content: The elderly couple argued that their daughter-in-law has sufficient independent income and has also received service benefits after their son's death.

content: Polling in Assam will be held on April 9, while counting of votes is scheduled for May 4. This will be the first Assembly election in the state after the 2023 delimitation exercise.

content: Police in Derby, located about 40 miles north of Birmingham, posted on Facebook that a black Suzuki Swift hit multiple people at the Friar Gate around 9:30 pm on Saturday.

content: In 1994, the Indian Air Force made him an Honorary Air Commodore in recognition of the over 5,000 hours of flying that he had put in.

title: Case Against Kerala Leader For Offering UAE Trip To Booth Workers
content: Authorities have recovered video footage of the convention in which the IUML leader allegedly made the offer.

title: What's next for Iowa, Purdue after Elite Eight exits: Recruits, transfer portal, more
content: andrej Stojakovic scores the and-1 bucket as Illinois beats Iowa to reach its first final four in 21 years . ESPN's Jeff Borzello and Myron Medcalf outline expected departures, returnees, top incoming recruits and transfer portal priorities .

title: Why NBA insiders are all-in on the Spurs: 'Victor breaks all the rules'
content: the Oklahoma City Thunder ended their longest road trip of the season with a loss to the Boston Celtics . it was the Thunder's first loss in a month . the San Antonio Spurs are a remarkable 23-2 since Feb. 1 .

title: No. 1 Arizona into first Final Four since 2001
content: for the first time since 2001, Arizona is headed to the Final Four . the top-seeded Wildcats punched their ticket with a 79-64 win against Purdue . it set the school record for wins in a season (36) in the process .

title: NHL playoff watch: Updated East, West wild-card-race projections
content: in the east, the Boston Bruins and Columbus Blue Jackets hold the precious wild-card positions . they are trailed most closely by the Ottawa Senators and Detroit Red Wings . the Philadelphia Flyers are also in action Sunday (7 p.m. ET, ESPN+ ).

title: Power Rankings: Each franchise's career playoff points leader
content: teams are battling for positioning and playoff spots . some players could add to their playoff point totals . a panel of hockey commentators, analysts, reporters and editors send in a 1-32 poll based on the games through Wednesday .

title: Men's March Madness: Predictions, previews for UConn-Duke, Michigan-Tennessee
content: UConn has the best chance of taking down a No. 1 seed in the Elite Eight . the Vols will have to execute a perfect game plan to reach the national semifinals for the first time in program history . it's time to decide the final two spots .
